# pageheader

## Import

```typescript
import { PageHeaderComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/page-header';
```

## Basic Usage

```html
<lu-page-header label="H1. Page title" description="Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed ac justo scelerisque, blandit nibh quis, imperdiet justo. Nullam condimentum nulla et neque ultricies bibendum."> </lu-page-header>
```

## API Reference

### PageHeaderComponent (component)

**Selector:** `lu-page-header`

#### Inputs

| Property | Binding name | Type | Default | Required | Transform | Description |
|----------|-------------|------|---------|----------|-----------|-------------|
| `description` | `description` | `PortalContent \| null` | `null` | тАФ | тАФ | PortalContent |
| `label` | `label` | `PortalContent \| null` | `null` | тАФ | тАФ | PortalContent |
| `container` | `container` | `boolean` | `false` | тАФ | `booleanAttribute` | [v20.1] Applique un container autour du contenu de Page Header. |
